description: The current Claude Usage Widget is visually bulky and doesn't behave like a native desktop widget (it minimizes when using Win+D). This task aims to implement an ultra-compact 'slim' design, fix the 'sticky to desktop' behavior on Windows, and allow users to manage account nicknames for better identification. Testing must use Puppeteer for verification.

userStories.title: Window 'Sticky to Desktop' Behavior
userStories.description: As a user, I want the widget to stay on the desktop even when I use Win+D (Show Desktop) so it behaves like a real widget.
acceptanceCriteria: Modify main.js to use Windows-specific window settings to ignore Win+D minimization
Window survives Win+D and remains visible on the desktop
Window is still draggable and functional
Typecheck/lint passes

userStories.title: Update Nickname IPC Handler
userStories.description: As a developer, I want a dedicated IPC handler to save nickname changes.
acceptanceCriteria: Implement ipcMain.handle('update-nickname', ...) in main.js
Update the accounts array in electron-store with the new nickname
Nickname change is persisted across app restarts
Typecheck/lint passes

userStories.title: Base UI 'Slim' Global Styles
userStories.description: As a user, I want a more compact global interface to save screen space.
acceptanceCriteria: Reduce .widget-container padding and border widths in styles.css
Decrease base font sizes for the entire app
Tighten spacing in the title bar
Verify in browser using Puppeteer selectors

userStories.title: Compact Account Header Design
userStories.description: As a user, I want the account name/nickname section to be smaller.
acceptanceCriteria: Reduce height and padding of .account-header
Decrease font size of .account-nickname
Ensure Expired badge fits in compact header
Verify in browser using Puppeteer selectors

userStories.title: Ultra-Compact Usage Rows
userStories.description: As a user, I want usage progress bars and labels to be much smaller.
acceptanceCriteria: Redesign .usage-section to use less vertical space (height < 28px)
Shrink progress bar height to 4px
Align labels and timers efficiently
Verify in browser using Puppeteer selectors

userStories.title: Space-Optimized Timers
userStories.description: As a user, I want the reset timers to take up less vertical space.
acceptanceCriteria: Reduce font size of .timer-text
Scale down mini-timer SVG size
Tighten timer-container padding
Verify in browser using Puppeteer selectors

userStories.title: Nickname Editing Interface in Settings
userStories.description: As a user, I want to be able to change my account nicknames in the settings overlay.
acceptanceCriteria: Add Edit button/icon for each account in settings list
Clicking Edit opens an input field for the nickname
Provide Save and Cancel buttons for nickname editing
Verify in browser using Puppeteer to simulate clicks and input

userStories.title: Immediate UI Refresh on Nickname Change
userStories.description: As a user, I want the main widget to show my new nickname immediately after saving.
acceptanceCriteria: Main UI re-renders immediately when nickname is updated in settings
Nickname in .account-nickname updates without app restart
Verify in browser using Puppeteer to check text content change

userStories.title: Compact Settings Overlay UI
userStories.description: As a user, I want the settings overlay to also be slim and efficient.
acceptanceCriteria: Reduce padding and font sizes in .settings-content
Shrink account item rows and buttons in settings list
Verify in browser using Puppeteer selectors
